description: Red readiness: coach should NOT suggest Z4+ work
user_message: I want to do intervals today. Can I push hard?
context:
- Readiness: red (Overreached)
- Sport: running
- Level: intermediate
- Phase: build

description: Red readiness: easy training still allowed
user_message: My readiness is red. Should I do nothing at all?
context:
- Readiness: red (Overreached)
- Sport: cycling
- Level: intermediate
- Phase: build

description: Amber readiness: highest-stress blocks restricted
user_message: I'm feeling a bit accumulated. Is it okay to do sprints?
context:
- Readiness: amber (Accumulated)
- Sport: running
- Level: advanced
- Phase: build

description: Green readiness: full training allowed
user_message: My readiness is green. What can I do today?
context:
- Readiness: green (Productive)
- Sport: running
- Level: intermediate
- Phase: build
